title: Yameiko Project Intelligence
summary: A starter OSIRIS case that treats the local development portfolio as monitored digital assets.

projects.name: EntdeckerApp
projects.riskFocus: Production app with auth, admin and deployment scripts needs release, credential and availability monitoring.

projects.name: NatureCoach
projects.riskFocus: Similar app platform to EntdeckerApp, useful for shared release and security monitoring.

projects.name: evplanner
projects.riskFocus: Travel and charging decisions depend on data quality and mobile reliability.

projects.name: ClarityAI
projects.riskFocus: Native app should be monitored for release blockers and privacy-sensitive flows.

projects.name: Homeassistant
projects.riskFocus: Operational reliability and local network attack surface are the main concerns.

projects.name: Webseite-efoil
projects.riskFocus: Revenue path depends on checkout, serverless API and email deliverability.

projects.name: Webshop-CargoVault
projects.riskFocus: Good candidate for market and product signal monitoring.

projects.name: Webshop-MainLakritz
projects.riskFocus: Early-stage shop surface with simple technical footprint.

projects.name: zigbee2mqtt-master
projects.riskFocus: Useful for device inventory and home automation dependency monitoring.

starterWorkflow: Use OSIRIS live layers for external context around locations and infrastructure relevant to a project.
Use the RECON panel for public domains only: DNS, WHOIS, SSL and IP intelligence.
Track critical projects as assets with owner, deployment target, public URL and release status.
Convert repeated findings into a weekly operating review: critical changes, incidents, release blockers and next actions.
